# Copilot custom instructions (generated)

- [Android quality standards](instructions/android-quality.instructions.md) — Architecture, language, lint, testing, file-decomposition rules for Android Kotlin projects
- [Commit and PR conventions](instructions/commit-convention.instructions.md) — Conventional Commits, squash-merge default, PR-based development with design-first draft PR pattern
- [Automated feedback-loop development cycle](instructions/dev-cycle.instructions.md) — 5-phase cycle (skeleton -> debug API -> deploy -> measure -> analyze -> improve) for AI-driven autonomous development
- [Multi-agent dispatch operations](instructions/dispatch-ops.instructions.md) — Polling, state reporting, approval-waiting protocol for multi-agent dispatch flows
- [Durable cross-references](instructions/durable-references.instructions.md) — Use SHA / ADR / tag / natural-text PR titles as primary references; treat
- [File granularity rule](instructions/file-granularity.instructions.md) — Limit per-file line counts to keep AI context windows efficient and enforce single-responsibility
- [Native technology by distribution target](instructions/native-distribution.instructions.md) — Decide language and runtime from the distribution form. Prefer portable native compile (Rust / Go / .NET AOT) → native shell + web UI (Tauri / Wails) → per-OS native (Swift / Kotlin / WinUI) → portable runtime (Python / Node) only when distribution pain is acceptable. Refuses anti-patterns like "Python + Windows EXE".
- [Mobile security (OWASP Mobile Top 10 + supply chain)](instructions/security-mobile.instructions.md) — API key handling, encryption, auth, permissions, ProGuard, logging, supply-chain hygiene for mobile codebases
